headline: CEO Wally Wobblebrain Launches 'Sneeze-Powered Smartphone' That Texts When You Achoo
summary: New gadget costs $699 and guarantees accidental embarrassing group chats.
fullBody: Wally Wobblebrain of GadgetGiggles Inc. unveiled the SneezerPhone at the annual Sniffle Summit. 'Why type when your nose can dictate?' he declared while demonstrating with a dramatic pollen attack. Early users report sending love notes to their bosses and marriage proposals to pizza places. Wobblebrain's next project is the BurpBook laptop.
